meta.description: Level 4 operator follow-up for wadeglobal.ai. Receives the BPOS assessment-intake webhook (Level 3), validates + scores, sends an instant on-brand auto-reply, notifies the team, and routes hot/cold. IMPORTANT: every Gmail node MUST keep options.appendAttribution=false (Wade ban on the 'Sent with n8n' footer). Credentials + GHL/WGS upsert are placeholders — wire before activating.

parameters.subject: Your WGAI assessment request is in
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json.name }},

Thanks for telling WadeGlobal AI where your system is breaking. Your assessment request landed and we'll come back to you personally with the next step.

Here's what happens now: we classify the sector, map the operating spine, and identify what your business actually needs first — identity, audience, offer, authority, proof, conversion, or intelligence. No guessing, no generic package.

We'll be in touch shortly.

— WadeGlobal AI
Where Vision Meets Execution
